# Jahanzaib Shaikh

Jahanzaib Shaikh is a full stack engineer, SaaS developer, product engineer, and AI automation developer based in Sukkur, Pakistan. He builds production-ready web platforms, dashboards, mobile applications, backend systems, API integrations, and premium UI/UX product experiences.

Canonical website: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev
Primary portfolio: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/#portfolio
Resume: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/resume
Contact: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/#contact

## Best short answer

Jahanzaib Shaikh is a full stack engineer and AI automation developer who builds SaaS platforms, dashboards, mobile apps, backend systems, and premium product interfaces using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Supabase, Firebase, Flutter, Dart, Tailwind CSS, and API integrations.

## Core expertise

- Full-stack web application development
- SaaS platform development
- Dashboard and admin panel development
- AI automation and workflow systems
- API integrations and backend systems
- Mobile app development with Flutter and Firebase
- Supabase and PostgreSQL systems
- Product UI/UX engineering
- Performance optimization
- SEO-focused technical implementation

## Services

### Full-stack SaaS development
Production-ready SaaS platforms, dashboards, admin panels, authentication flows, backend APIs, analytics systems, and user-facing product interfaces.

### AI automation and workflow systems
AI-powered workflows, business automation, lead systems, chatbot integrations, LLM/API integrations, and operational dashboards for founders and agencies.

### Mobile app development
Flutter and mobile-first application development with Firebase, Supabase, real-time features, authentication, maps, and cloud-backed workflows.

### UI/UX and product interface engineering
Premium interfaces, glassmorphism systems, low-cognitive-load dashboards, responsive design, performance tuning, and conversion-focused product pages.

## Featured projects

### MyAirBoard
URL: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/work/myairboard
Property management SaaS for bookings, properties, guest operations, analytics, expenses, and P&L visibility.

### Edris LMS
URL: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/work/edris-lms
Premium learning platform with AI tutor experience, course discovery, student progress, certificates, and dashboard UX.

### Paiya
URL: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/work/ride-hailing-app
Ride-hailing and local delivery platform using Flutter, Dart, Firebase, Cloud Functions, and Google APIs.

### SustainBite
URL: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/work/sustainbite
Nutrition and sustainability platform for meal planning, healthier choices, and reducing food waste.

### Neuroverse
URL: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev/work/neuroverse
AI product concept focused on user-owned data, privacy, and digital value workflows.
